children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of State or Federal law (other than , , , , or any order authorized under ), the covered contractual payment obligations and the covered contractual payment entitlements between any 2 financial institutions shall be terminated, liquidated, accelerated, and netted in accordance with, and subject to the conditions of, the terms of any applicable netting contract (except as provided in ).section 1821(e) of this titlesection 5390(c) of this titlesection 4617 of this titlesection 1787(c) of this titlesection 78eee(b)(2) of title 15section 561(b)(2) of title 11

children.heading: Limitation on obligation to make payment
children.label: b Limitation on obligation to make payment
children.text: The only obligation, if any, of a financial institution to make payment with respect to covered contractual payment obligations to another financial institution shall be equal to its net obligation to such other financial institution, and no such obligation shall exist if there is no net obligation.

children.heading: Limitation on right to receive payment
children.label: c Limitation on right to receive payment
children.text: The only right, if any, of a financial institution to receive payments with respect to covered contractual payment entitlements from another financial institution shall be equal to its net entitlement with respect to such other financial institution, and no such right shall exist if there is no net entitlement.

children.heading: Payment of net entitlement of failed financial institution
children.label: d Payment of net entitlement of failed financial institution
children.text: The net entitlement of any failed financial institution, if any, shall be paid to the failed financial institution in accordance with, and subject to the conditions of, the applicable netting contract.

children.heading: Effectiveness notwithstanding status as financial institution
children.label: e Effectiveness notwithstanding status as financial institution
children.text: This section shall be given effect notwithstanding that a financial institution is a failed financial institution.

children.heading: Enforceability of security agreements
children.label: f Enforceability of security agreements
children.text: The provisions of any security agreement or arrangement or other credit enhancement related to one or more netting contracts between any 2 financial institutions shall be enforceable in accordance with their terms (except as provided in ), and shall not be stayed, avoided, or otherwise limited by any State or Federal law (other than , , and ).section 561(b)(2) of title 11section 1821(e) of this titlesection 1787(c) of this titlesection 78eee(b)(2) of title 15
